sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20911" key="braxu/wtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρᾰχῠ´-ωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">οὖς</etym>) <sense id="n20911.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with short handles</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κώθων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0465.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Henioch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
